name: Holiday Candy Plush Stuffed Character Toy - Cloud Island™
description:
Refresh your baby's nursery for the holidays with the Holiday Candy Baby Toy from Cloud Island™. This baby toy is designed in the shape of a peppermint candy with a smiling face along with red and white broad stripes for a cute, festive look. Made of 90% recycled polyester fabric, this holiday baby toy also has shiny sea green detailing that elevates the look.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
